runners.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 340m in 19.57 last start, beating Noah Bonkers. Likes the rails so makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 431m. Last start finished 5th on April 8 over 431m at this track behind Scootin' Scooby beaten 9 lengths (25.54) in a Grade 5. Capable of a strong show.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (25.28) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 5.5 lengths. Has three successes and five minors from 14 starts from box 4. Others appear better placed.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2.25 lengths over 340m at this track in a handy (20.06), beating Major Conflict. Will find this a bit tougher, happy to risk in this.

runners.formComment: Charged out of the boxes last time with a fast early sectional but swallowed up late, finishing fourth (25.09) at this track and bringing a two run winning streak to an end. Broke a two-start winning streak when fourth last time. Can bounce back.

runners.formComment: Drawn the outside box and could be suited with some luck. Goes ok at this track and distance but recent form not good enough, not going well enough. Needs to lift.
